daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are soft and introspective rn. Your intuition is basically a cheat code today—trust those gut feelings even if they seem random. Perfect energy for deep work or honest convos.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's romantic or platonic, the universe is orchestrating a meaningful reconnection. Stay open but don't force anything.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is off the charts today. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a calculated risk. Your confidence is your superpower.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest and gentle movement—yoga, walks, stretching. Nothing intense needed. Hydration and good sleep will do wonders for your clarity and mood.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of intuition this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings hitting different—they're basically your cosmic group chat telling you what's up. Vibe shifts incoming.
weekly.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into authenticity over performance. Real connections thrive when you stop trying to be the 'chill' version of yourself.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but pace matters. You don't need to pitch everything immediately. Let your creative energy marinate a bit—your colleagues will notice the shift in your presence this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms. Skip the productivity grind and honor what actually refuels you—whether that's water, rest, or just existing without a to-do list. Self-care isn't lazy.
